items.summary: Cover of Netzwerk neu A1 Testheft with audio and digital-access info.
Imprint: authors, publisher, ISBN, copyright and Indian distribution details.
Table of contents plus legend of the symbols used in the booklet.
Introduction: who the tests are for, structure, scoring and grading scale.
Overview mapping each test task to Start Deutsch 1 and OeSD exam formats.
Chapter 1 greetings: listening multiple-choice, true/false, and question-word gap-fill.
Chapter 1: reorder sentences, conjugate verbs, match countries and languages.
Chapter 1: read profiles to note info; fill a course registration form.
Chapter 2: listening true/false, correct phone numbers, and odd-one-out vocabulary.
Chapter 2: form yes/no questions, conjugate verbs, articles and plural forms.
Chapter 2: fill a yoga-course registration form; speaking task introducing yourself.
Chapter 3 Hamburg: listening notes, listening choice, and reading gap-fill.
Chapter 3: crossword, choose ein/kein articles, write imperative directions.
Chapter 3: transport words with articles; speaking task asking for directions.
Chapter 4 food: listening choice, odd-one-out, nominative/accusative articles.
Chapter 4: read a party invitation (true/false) and a chef profile (Q&A).
Chapter 4: complete sentences, write your eating habits, food speaking cards.
Chapter 5: choose correct clock times and match texts to everyday photos.
Chapter 5: choose reactions, complete possessives, build modal-verb sentences.
Chapter 5 review: true/false reading on party emails, gap-fill invitation email, speaking role-play.
Chapter 6 opener: listening note-taking, restaurant odd-one-out vocabulary, accusative pronoun gap-fill.
Separable verbs, past tense of haben/sein, and true/false reading of public signs.
Write a birthday invitation and speak to arrange four meet-ups with a partner.
Chapter 7 opener: office listening choices, computer verb vocabulary, workday preposition gap-fill.
Connectors und/oder/aber and reading three job-related ads with yes/no questions.
Write a roughly 30-word email reply arranging a farewell for an intern.
Fill a newsletter form from a text, then practise office small talk.
Chapter 8 opener: medical listening choices, health odd-one-out vocabulary, naming body parts.
Modal verbs in a doctor dialogue and writing imperative health advice.
Match health/prohibition notices to pictures, write a sick note, practise polite requests.
Chapter 9 opener: apartment true/false listening and matching photos to spoken texts.
Furniture prepositions, choosing fitting reactions, and true/false reading of housewarming-party emails.
Describe your apartment, reply to a party invitation email, and speak about home/parties.
Chapter 10 opener: job-priority listening, workplace vocabulary, past-participle gap-fill.
Form perfect-tense sentences, match telephone phrases, and complete a job-board registration form.
Match five job-seeker situations to newspaper ads and introduce yourself in speaking.
Chapter 11 opener: multiple-choice listening about shopping, prices, and clothing.
Shopping verbs, welch-/dies- forms, case pronouns, and locating goods by department-store floor.
Reading: match six headings to five short texts about the city Düsseldorf.
Write a reply email about interview clothing; partner speaking task on clothes and shops.
Chapter 12 test: listening true/false and choice, odd-word-out, writing travel questions.
Reading test: choose which of two websites (a or b) holds the needed information.
Write a holiday email; describe and role-play one of three travel pictures.
Audio transcripts for listening chapters 1-3 (greetings, people, Hamburg).
Audio transcripts for chapters 4-5 (food shopping, telling time, family, directions).
Audio transcripts for chapters 6-8 (invitations, office day, doctor messages).
Audio transcripts for chapters 8-10 (doctor, apartments, moving, jobs).
Audio transcripts for chapters 11-12 (shopping talk, station announcements, travel questions).
Answer key (Lösungen) for chapters 1-3.
Answer key (Lösungen) for chapters 4-6.
Answer key (Lösungen) for chapters 6-8.
Answer key (Lösungen) for chapters 8-11.
Answer key (Lösungen) for chapters 11-12.
Scoring guide: points-to-percent scale and Start Deutsch 1 writing/speaking criteria.
Scoring guide: ÖSD Zertifikat A1 writing/speaking criteria, pass marks, grade bands.
Picture credits and source list (Quellenverzeichnis).
